records.stderr_pattern: Exceeded timeout of \d+ ms for a test|jest\.setTimeout|--testTimeout
records.description: Jest test timeout exceeded — increase test timeout via --testTimeout flag or set_timeout hint

reproduction.command: node -e "console.error('thrown: \"Exceeded timeout of 5000 ms for a test.\nUse jest.setTimeout(newTimeout) to increase the timeout value, if this is a long-running test.\"')" 2>&1 || true

records.description: Generic Node.js operation timeout — increase timeout for network or I/O bound operations

reproduction.command: node -e "const ac=new AbortController(); setTimeout(()=>ac.abort(),50); const {setTimeout:st}=require('timers/promises'); st(10000,null,{signal:ac.signal}).catch(e=>console.error(e.message))" 2>&1 || true
